sections.title: Revision of Days 51-59 — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Revision of Days 51-59 — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Revision of Days 51-59 is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Mixed revision: Reported Speech, Question Tags, Comparatives/Superlatives, Articles, Conditionals, Since/For, Wish/If Only. Rules: Reported speech backshifts tense; question tags use opposite polarity | Comparatives/superlatives change form based on adjective length | Articles depend on specificity and sound; conditionals depend on real vs unreal situations | 'Since' + starting point, 'for' + duration; 'wish/if only' express regret
sections.formula: Mixed revision: Reported Speech, Question Tags, Comparatives/Superlatives, Articles, Conditionals, Since/For, Wish/If Only

examples.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह थका हुआ था।
examples.english: He said that he was tired.

examples.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं कहाँ रहता था।
examples.english: She asked where I lived.

examples.hindi: तुम आ रहे हो, है ना?
examples.english: You are coming, aren't you?

examples.hindi: राम सबसे लंबा है।
examples.english: Ram is the tallest.

examples.hindi: यह सबसे दिलचस्प किताब है।
examples.english: This is the most interesting book.

examples.hindi: मुझे एक किताब चाहिए।
examples.english: I need a book.

sections.title: Revision of Days 51-59 — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Revision of Days 51-59 — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Revision of Days 51-59 for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Mixed revision: Reported Speech, Question Tags, Comparatives/Superlatives, Articles, Conditionals, Since/For, Wish/If Only

examples.hindi: सूरज पूरब से निकलता है।
examples.english: The sun rises in the east.

examples.hindi: अगर तुम मेहनत करोगे, तो सफल होगे।
examples.english: If you work hard, you will succeed.

examples.hindi: अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह घर खरीदता।
examples.english: If I had money, I would buy this house.

examples.hindi: अगर मैंने मेहनत की होती, तो मैं पास हो जाता।
examples.english: If I had worked hard, I would have passed.

examples.hindi: मैं दो साल से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I have been living here for two years.

examples.hindi: मैं 2020 से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I have been living here since 2020.

sections.title: Revision of Days 51-59 — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Revision of Days 51-59 — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Revision of Days 51-59 in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Mixed revision: Reported Speech, Question Tags, Comparatives/Superlatives, Articles, Conditionals, Since/For, Wish/If Only

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।
examples.english: I wish I had more money.

examples.hindi: काश मैंने पहले पढ़ाई की होती।
examples.english: If only I had studied earlier.

examples.hindi: उसने मुझे यह काम करने को कहा।
examples.english: He told me to do this work.

examples.hindi: वह अच्छा गाता है, है ना?
examples.english: He sings well, doesn't he?

sections.title: Revision of Days 51-59 — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Revision of Days 51-59 — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Revision of Days 51-59. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Mixed revision: Reported Speech, Question Tags, Comparatives/Superlatives, Articles, Conditionals, Since/For, Wish/If Only

examples.hindi: यह फिल्म उस फिल्म से बेहतर है।
examples.english: This movie is better than that movie.

examples.hindi: वह teacher बहुत अच्छी है।
examples.english: The teacher is very good.

examples.hindi: अगर वह जल्दी आया, तो हम शुरू करेंगे।
examples.english: If he comes early, we will start.

examples.hindi: मुझे काश मैं यह भाषा जानता।
examples.english: I wish I knew this language.
